title: Walmart Store Sales
description: This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010  and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of  the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
stepByStepContent:
Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Create KPI Indicators and Logos for visuals
Detailed Instructions:

Steps(Arrow YOY % for Sales YOY)

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Visual Card
Drag the Arrow YOY % measure to the fields value box
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

General: Properties, Size, Height=49, Width=64, Position, Horizontal=148, Vertical=342

               Title=Off

               Effects: Background=Off  

Visual: Callout Value: Font=DIN(45)
                                    Font color=fx (click on the function tab and fill up values as per image below)
                                    Format Style = Rules, What field should we base this on? = Sales YOY
                                    Color Codes: Green=#079952, Red=#C00000, Yellow=#FFC220

            

            Category label=Off

Steps(Arrow YOY CPI )

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Visual Card
Drag the Arrow YOY CPI measure to the fields value box
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

General: Properties, Size, Height=49, Width=64, Position, Horizontal=148, Vertical=571

               Title=Off

               Effects: Background=Off  

Visual: Callout Value: Font=DIN(45)
                                    Font color=fx (click on the function tab and fill up values as per image below)
                                    Format Style = Rules, What field should we base this on? = CPI YOY
                                    Color Codes: Green=#079952, Red=#C00000, Yellow=#FFC220

      Category label=Off

Steps (Walmart Logo for Visual Headers)

From Power BI Desktop ribbon under Insert, click on Image from Elements
Select the Yellow Walmart logo from the downloadable file provided in this project
Under the Visualizations pane, Image, Style, and Scaling select the Fill option from the dropdown 

 Click on General and fill in the figures provided below for each KPI and Visual

KPIs

Year Slider:  Size: Height=42, Width= 62
                     Position: Horizontal=160, Vertical=73

Sales per Month:  Size: Height=42, Width= 62
                             Position: Horizontal=160, Vertical=175

Sales YOY:  Size: Height=42, Width= 62
                     Position: Horizontal=160, Vertical=295

CPI  :  Size: Height=42, Width= 62
           Position: Horizontal=160, Vertical=413

CPI YOY:     Size: Height=42, Width= 62
                     Position: Horizontal=160, Vertical=530

Refreshed Date:  Size: Height=42, Width= 62
                            Position: Horizontal=160, Vertical=644

Visuals

Sales by Month:  Size: Height=42, Width= 62
                            Position: Horizontal=701, Vertical=73

Sales by Holiday:  Size: Height=42, Width= 62
                            Position: Horizontal=1218, Vertical=73

Sales by Store:  Size: Height=42, Width= 62
                            Position: Horizontal=701, Vertical=383

Sales by Month:  Size: Height=42, Width= 62
                            Position: Horizontal=1218, Vertical=383

       

  

Make sure to Save Up before closing the window! 

Insight: 
Huge List of Unicode Symbols

Did you complete the Project?

allStepDetails.content:
Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Expected Final Dashboard
Detailed Instructions:

Insight: 

Introduction to dashboards for Power BI designers

Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Import CSV file into Power BI Desktop
Detailed Instructions:

Steps

Download the 'Walmart Sales Data'  file by clicking the red icon above.
Open Power BI Desktop
Click on Get data button 
Select Text/CSV and click on connect 
Select the 'Walmart' CSV file and click on Open
A preview of the data will be displayed, click on Load 

Insight: 

Importing Bulk Files in Power BI

Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Create a relationship between Walmart Table and Calendar Table
Detailed Instructions:

Steps

Go to the data modeling page by clicking on this icon --> 
Drag and connect the Date column of the Walmart table with that of the Calendar Table

Insight: 
Understanding Relationships in Power BI Desktop

Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Create conditional columns
Detailed Instructions:

Steps(Holiday Weeks)

Select Transform Data from the Home tab
Under power query Editor click on Add Column tab
Select Conditional Column 
In New Column Name box type in 'Holiday Flag 2'
In the IF statement boxes type in values like shown in the image below
After filling up one line to go to the next line, click on the Add Clause button 
Press OK
Under Home tab , Click close and Apply  

Steps(Unemployment Rate)

Select Transform Data from the Home tab
Under power query Editor click on Add Column tab
Select Conditional Column 
In New Column Name box type in 'Unemployment Rate'
In the IF statement boxes type in values like shown in the image below
After filling up one line, to go to the next line click on the Add Clause button 
After filling up all the statements needed, Press OK
Under Home tab , Click close and Apply  

Insight: 
Writing IF Statements in Power Query

Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Create Sorting Columns for the conditional Columns, and custom sort them
Detailed Instructions:

Steps

Create conditional columns for Holiday Order and Unemployment group using steps as shown in the gif and images below

A. Holiday Order 

B. Unemployment Group 

Steps (Custom Column Sorting)

 Click on the Table tab  on the left of the canvas, and select the 'Walmart' Table
Highlight 'Holiday Flag 2' Column by clicking on the header 
Under Column tools tab, right click on Sort by Column Tab and choose Holiday Order from the drop down option 
Highlight 'Unemployment Rate' column and under sort by column tab, choose Unemployment group
Select Calendar Table, and highlight 'Month Name short' column 
Right Click on Sort by Column Tab and choose Month Number from the drop down option 
Save

Insight: 
Sort by more than one column in Power BI

Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Adding Project Logos and Title for the Dashboard
Detailed Instructions:

Steps (Colaberry Logo)

From Power BI Desktop ribbon under Insert, click on Image from Elements
Select the colaberry logo from the downloadable file provided in this project
Under the Visualizations pane , click on General and fill in the figures provided below

          Size: Height=73, Width=205
          Position: Horizontal=0, Vertical=7

Steps (Walmart Logo)

From Power BI Desktop ribbon under Insert, click on Image from Elements
Select the Walmart logo from the downloadable file provided in this project
Under the Visualizations pane, Image, Style, and Scaling select the Fill option from the dropdown 

 Click on General and fill in the figures provided below

          Size: Height=73, Width=205
          Position: Horizontal=1075, Vertical=8

Steps (Title)

From Power BI Desktop ribbon under Insert, click on Text box from Elements
Type in 'Walmart Store Sales (Feb 2010 - Oct 2012)' in the text box
Select center alignment for the text (Font = Segoe(bold), Font size = 28, Font Color = #4184C5) 
 Click on General and under properties, fill in the figures provided below
          Size: Height=73, Width=1279
          Position: Horizontal=1, Vertical=7
Click on Format from Power Bi Desktop, Select Send Backward tab, and click on Send to back button

 

Save after you're done 

Insight: 
Using IMAGES in Power BI

Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Create Slider and Visual Cards for KPIs
Detailed Instructions:

Steps(Year Slider)

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Slider
Under the Fields Pane from Calendar Table drag year column to the fields value box
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

General: Properties, Size, Height=105, Width=205, Position, Horizontal=1, Vertical=80
               Title=On, Text=Year, Font=Segoe UI Bold (14), Text color=#FFFFFF, Background color=#4184C5, Horizontal alignment=Center
               Effects, Background=On, Background color=#E6E6E6, Visual boarder=On, Boarder color-#CCCCCC 

Visual: Values, Font=Segoe UI Bold(10), Font color=#252423
            Slider=On

   

Steps(Sales per Mth)

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Visual Card
Drag the Sales per Month measure to the fields value box
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

General: Properties, Size, Height=118, Width=205, Position, Horizontal=1, Vertical=183
               Title=On, Text=Sales per Mth, Font=Segoe UI Bold (14), Text color=#FFFFFF, Background color=#4184C5, Horizontal alignment=Center
               Effects, Background=On, Background color=#E6E6E6, Visual boarder=On, Boarder color-#CCCCCC 

Visual: Callout Value, Font=DIN(32), Font color=#00498D
            Category label=Off

Steps(Sales YOY)

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Visual Card
Drag the Sales YOY measure to the fields value box
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

General: Properties, Size, Height=118, Width=205, Position, Horizontal=1, Vertical=302
               Title=On, Text=Sales YOY, Font=Segoe UI Bold (14), Text color=#FFFFFF, Background color=#4184C5, Horizontal alignment=Center
               Effects, Background=On, Background color=#E6E6E6, Visual boarder=On, Boarder color-#CCCCCC 

Visual: Callout Value, Font=DIN(32), Font color=#D9B300
            Category label=Off

Steps(CPI)

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Visual Card
Drag the AVG CPI measure to the fields value box
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

General: Properties, Size, Height=118, Width=205, Position, Horizontal=1, Vertical=420
               Title=On, Text=CPI, Font=Segoe UI Bold (14), Text color=#FFFFFF, Background color=#4184C5, Horizontal alignment=Center
               Effects, Background=On, Background color=#E6E6E6, Visual boarder=On, Boarder color-#CCCCCC 

Visual: Callout Value, Font=DIN(32), Font color=#E66C37
            Category label=Off

Steps(CPI YOY)

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Visual Card
Drag the CPI YOY measure to the fields value box
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

General: Properties, Size, Height=118, Width=205, Position, Horizontal=1, Vertical=538
               Title=On, Text=CPI YOY, Font=Segoe UI Bold (14), Text color=#FFFFFF, Background color=#4184C5, Horizontal alignment=Center
               Effects, Background=On, Background color=#E6E6E6, Visual boarder=On, Boarder color-#CCCCCC 

Visual: Callout Value, Font=DIN(32), Font color=#9BA5A8
            Category label=Off

Steps(Refreshed Date)

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Visual Card
Drag the Date Time from refresh Date Table to the fields value box
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

General: Properties, Size, Height=65, Width=205, Position, Horizontal=1, Vertical=655
               Title=On, Text=Refreshed Date, Font=DIN (14), Text color=#FFFFFF, Background color=#4184C5, Horizontal alignment=Center
               Effects, Background=On, Background color=#E6E6E6, Visual boarder=On, Boarder color-#CCCCCC 

Visual: Callout Value, Font=DIN(15), Font color=#252423
            Category label=Off

Insight: 
How to pick STUNNING colors for your Power BI reports!

Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Line and Stacked Column Visuals
Detailed Instructions:

Line and Stacked Column Visual 1(Sales by Month)

Steps

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Line and Stacked Column Chart
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

Build Visual Tab:

Shared axis = Year, Month Name Short
Column Values = Sales per Month
Line Values = Sales YOY, CPI YOY
Tooltips = Sales YOY, CPI, CPI YOY
After filling up the above rename fields, as per gif provided below
Sort axis by Month Name Short, and ascending order

Format Visual Tab:

General: Properties, Size, Height=310, Width=557, Position, Horizontal=206, Vertical=80
               Title=On, Text=Sales by Month, Font=Segoe UI Bold (15), Text color=#FFFFFF, Background color=#4184C5, Horizontal alignment=Center
               Effects: Background=On, Background color=#E6E6E6, Visual boarder=On, Boarder color-#CCCCCC 

Visual: X-axis: Values: Font=Segoe UI (9), Font color=#333333
                         Title = Off

             Y-axis: Values: Font=Segoe UI Bold (9), Font color=#00498D, Display Units=Millions
                         Title = Off

             Secondary Y-axis: Range: Align Zeros = On
                                           Values: Font=Segoe UI Bold (9), Font color=#D9B300, Display Units=Auto
                                           Title = Off

             Gridlines: Horizontal=On, Color=#333333

             Lines: Colors: Sales YOY=D9B300, CPI YOY=#9BA5A8, Shade area=On

             Markers= On

             Columns: Colors=00498D

             Data labels: Sales YOY = Off
                                 CPI YOY = Off  
                                 Sales per Mth: Position(Column)= Inside end, Orientation (Column)= Vertical
                                                         Values: Font=Segoe UI (9), Color=#FFFFFF, Value decimal places= 0
                                                          Background = Off

Gif step 1

Gif step 2

Gif step 3

Gif step 4

Line and Stacked Column Visual 2 (Sales by Holiday)

Steps

Right click on the sales by Month visual and copy paste(Ctrl+v) 
Change figures provided below for the necessary fields

Build Visual Tab:

Shared axis = Holiday Flag 2
Sort axis by Holiday Flag 2, and ascending order

Format Visual Tab:

General: Properties, Size, Height=310, Width=518, Position, Horizontal=762, Vertical=80
                Title=On, Text=Sales by Holiday 

 Visual: Data labels: Orientation (Column)= Vertical

Line and Stacked Column Visual 3 (Sales vs Unemployment Rate)

Steps

Right click on the sales by Month visual and copy paste(Ctrl+v) 
Change figures provided below for the necessary fields

Build Visual Tab:

Shared axis = Unemployment Rate
Sort axis by Unemployment rate, and ascending order

Format Visual Tab:

General: Properties, Size, Height=330, Width=518, Position, Horizontal=762, Vertical=390
                Title=On, Text=Sales vs Unemployment Rate 

 Visual: Data labels: Orientation (Column)= Vertical

Insight: 
Power BI Line and Stacked Chart Creation and Formatting

Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Scatter Chart
Detailed Instructions:

Scatter Chart Visual 4(Sales by Store)

Steps

Right click on the sales by Month visual and copy paste (Ctrl+v)
Click on Scatter chart icon from Visuals pane to change the visual in to a scatter chart 
Change figures provided below for the necessary fields

Build Visual Tab:

Values = Store
X Axis = Sales per Month
Y Axis = Sales YOY
Size = Sales per Mth
Tooltips = Sales per Mth, Sales YOY, CPI, CPI YOY

Format Visual Tab:

General: Properties, Size, Height=330, Width=557, Position, Horizontal=206, Vertical=390
                

Visual: X-axis: Values: Font=Segoe UI (9), Font color=#00498D
                         Title = On

             Y-axis: Values: Font=Segoe UI Bold (9), Font color=#D9B300, Display Units=Auto
                         Title = On

             

             Gridlines: Vertical=On, Color=#333333

             

             Markers: Colors= fx (click on the function tab and fill up values as per image below)
                            Color codes: Lowest Value=#D9B2A3, Middle Value=#EA9977, Highest Value=#DB4708

         

             (After setting up custom color for Markers Legend will be active)

             Legend: Position = Top
                           Text = Segoe(10), Color=#E66C37  
                           Title = On

Gif Step 1

Gif Step 2

Gif Step 3

Insight: 
How to create Scatter Plot in Microsoft Power BI

Walmart Store Sales
This project dashboard assess year over year sales conducted among 45 random Walmart Stores in the US between Feb 2010 and Oct 2012. Although this was a dawn era of coming out of the great recession of 2008, these Walmart Stores have faced an impact in sales like any discount or department stores.
Step Name:Create KPI Indicators and Logos for visuals
Detailed Instructions:

Steps(Arrow YOY % for Sales YOY)

Click on an empty space on the canvas, and from the visualizations pane select Visual Card
Drag the Arrow YOY % measure to the fields value box
Fill up figures provided below for the necessary fields

General: Properties, Size, Height=49, Width=64, Position, Horizontal=148, Vertical=342

               Title=Off

               Effects: Background=Off  

Visual: Callout Value: Font=DIN(45)
                                    Font color=fx (click on the function tab and fill up values as per image below)
                                    Format Style = Rules, What field should we base this on? = Sales YOY
                                    Color Codes: Green=#079952, Red=#C00000, Yellow=#FFC220

            

            Category label=Off

Select the Yellow Walmart logo from the downloadable file provided in this project
Under the Visualizations pane, Image, Style, and Scaling select the Fill option from the dropdown

Did you complete the Project?

portfolioContent.title: Walmart Store Sales
portfolioContent.portfolioSummary: Developed a comprehensive Power BI dashboard analyzing year-over-year sales across 45 Walmart stores from 2010 to 2012. The project highlights sales trends during the post-recession period using key performance indicators and visual analytics.
portfolioContent.summary: This project involved creating an interactive Power BI dashboard to assess year-over-year sales performance of 45 Walmart stores in the US between February 2010 and October 2012. It focused on visualizing sales trends, CPI, and holiday impacts during the recovery phase following the 2008 recession. The dashboard incorporated KPI indicators, conditional formatting, and custom sorting to enhance data insights.
portfolioContent.businessProblem: Walmart stores, like many discount retailers, faced fluctuating sales during the recovery from the 2008 recession. Understanding year-over-year sales trends was critical to identifying performance gaps and seasonal impacts across multiple store locations. The challenge was to consolidate and visualize sales data effectively to support strategic decision-making.
objectives: Analyze year-over-year sales trends across multiple Walmart stores.
Create KPI indicators and visual cues to highlight sales performance and CPI changes.
Develop an interactive Power BI dashboard for easy exploration of sales data by month, store, and holiday periods.
workflow: Import Walmart sales CSV data into Power BI Desktop.
Create relationships between sales data and calendar tables for time intelligence.
Develop conditional columns to flag holidays and unemployment rate groups.
Design KPI indicators with color-coded year-over-year sales and CPI arrows.
Build and arrange visuals including sales by month, store, and holiday on the dashboard.
keyInsights: Sales across Walmart stores showed varied recovery patterns post-2008 recession.
Holiday weeks significantly influenced sales performance in multiple stores.
Consumer Price Index (CPI) changes correlated with sales fluctuations year-over-year.
Custom KPIs and visual indicators effectively highlighted positive and negative sales trends.
businessImpact: Enabled Walmart management to identify stores with slower sales recovery.
Provided actionable insights on holiday and seasonal sales impacts for inventory planning.
Improved decision-making through clear visualization of sales and economic indicators.
